---
title: "Alain Amstutz"
subtitle: "MD PhD"
people_group: "any"
email: "alain.amstutz@unibas.ch"
page-layout: full
image: alain.jpg
about:
  id: about
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image: alain.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:alain.amstutz@unibas.ch
    - icon: link
      text: Weitere Informationen
      href: https://universe.unibas.ch/people/3323/94/overview
---

<div style="text-align: center;">
  <p style="font-size: 18px;">Klinische Epidemiologie, Universitätsspital Basel</p>
</div>
